The boss rented a storefront in the Hongyang Home Furnishing City, mainly trading in hardware, pipes, electrical wires, and electromechanical equipment. The so-called 'stainless steel processing' is highly likely just placing a cutting machine at the shop entrance to help customers cut the steel pipes they bought.
